member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.DashboardController
member.summary: Admin API controller for dashboard summary statistics.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.DashboardController.GetStats(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Returns aggregate dashboard statistics for the admin panel. Includes total filling stations, stakeholders, transactions, today's total amount, and pending disbursements.

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.FillingStationsController
member.summary: Admin API controller for full CRUD management of filling stations.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.FillingStationsController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all filling stations with their stakeholder counts.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.FillingStationsController.GetById(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single filling station by ID, including stakeholder count.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.FillingStationsController.Create(GzsBilling.Domain.Models.CreateFillingStationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new filling station.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.FillingStationsController.Update(System.Int32,GzsBilling.Domain.Models.CreateFillingStationRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates an existing filling station.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.FillingStationsController.Delete(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Soft-deletes a filling station by setting IsActive to false.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.FillingStationsController.Activate(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reactivates a soft-deleted filling station.

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.SettingsController
member.summary: Admin API controller for managing system settings as key-value pairs.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.SettingsController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all system settings.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.SettingsController.GetByKey(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single system setting by its key.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.SettingsController.Update(System.String,GzsBilling.Domain.Models.UpdateSettingRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Updates (or creates) a system setting value.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.SettingsController.GetCategories(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all distinct setting categories.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.UsersController.GetAll(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Lists all users.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.UsersController.GetById(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a single user by ID.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.UsersController.Create(GzsBilling.Domain.Models.CreateUserRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new user (superadmin only).

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.Admin.UsersController.ToggleActive(System.Guid,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Toggles a user's active status (activate/deactivate).

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Login(GzsBilling.Domain.Models.LoginRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.AuthController.Register(GzsBilling.Domain.Models.CreateUserRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new user. Only superadmins can register new users.

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.QrCodeController
member.summary: QR-kod yaratish uchun API. Yoqilg'i quyish shoxobchalarida to'lov QR kodlari generatsiya qiladi.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.QrCodeController.GenerateQr(System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: QR-kod generatsiya qiladi va base64 PNG formatda qaytaradi. QR ichida to'lov URL: gzs-billing://pay?station=ID&dispenser=ID&payment=ID

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.QrCodeController.GetActivePayments(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Barcha faol to'lov provayderlari ro'yxati.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.QrCodeController.GetActiveStations(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Barcha faol shoxobchalar ro'yxati (QR generatsiya uchun).

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.QrCodeController.GetDispensers(System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Shoxobchadagi faol kolonkalar ro'yxati.

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.QrCodeResponse
member.summary: QR-kod javobi.

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovProsessController
member.summary: API controller for managing payment initiation and callback processing from payment providers (Click, Paynet) in the GZS Billing System.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovProsessController.InitsializatsiyaTolovAsync(GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovInitiateRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initiates a new payment transaction for a refueling session. Accepts filling station ID, dispenser ID, and payment provider ID. Validates idempotency, pulls live metrics from UGaz API, and returns a newly generated transaction ID.
member.param: Payment initiation payload containing station, dispenser, and payment identifiers.
member.returns: 201 Created with the generated transaction_id on success. 409 Conflict if an idempotency key collision is detected. 502 Bad Gateway if the UGaz API is unreachable.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovProsessController.CallbackTolovTasdiqlashAsync(GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovCallbackRequest,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes a payment callback from the payment provider (Click/Paynet). Requires the X-Idempotency-Key header for safe retry handling. On successful completion, the transaction is immediately published to RabbitMQ for the 24-hour reconciliation buffer.
member.param: Callback payload containing transaction_id, status, and confirmed total_sum.
member.returns: 200 OK with the updated transaction state. 400 Bad Request if validation fails. 404 Not Found if the transaction does not exist.

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovInitiateRequest
member.summary: Request payload for initiating a payment transaction.

member.name: P:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovInitiateRequest.filling_station_id
member.summary: The filling station identifier assigned by UGaz.

member.name: P:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovInitiateRequest.dispenser_id
member.summary: The fuel dispenser identifier at the station.

member.name: P:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovInitiateRequest.payment_id
member.summary: The payment provider identifier (1=Uzcard, 2=Humo).

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovCallbackRequest
member.summary: Request payload for payment provider callback confirmation.

member.name: P:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovCallbackRequest.transaction_id
member.summary: The transaction ID generated during initiation.

member.name: P:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovCallbackRequest.status
member.summary: The final status: "completed", "failed", or "canceled".

member.name: P:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.TolovCallbackRequest.total_sum
member.summary: The confirmed total amount from the payment provider.

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.UGazCallbackController
member.summary: UGaz dan keladigan callback (to'lov tasdiqlash) uchun endpoint.

member.name: M:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.UGazCallbackController.UGazCallback(GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.UGazCallbackPayload,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: UGaz callback — to'lov natijasini qabul qiladi.

member.name: T:GzsBilling.Api.Controllers.UGazCallbackPayload
member.summary: UGaz callback payload modeli.
